title: AI Quick Start
subtitle: 10 Free Prompts That Will Change How You Work

sections.title: Welcome
sections.content: These 10 prompts are hand-picked from our full AI Starter Kit (50+ prompts). They cover the areas where AI makes the biggest immediate impact on your work.

sections.title: How to Use
sections.content: Step-by-step guide for using the prompts.

items.instruction: Copy the prompt from this guide
Replace [bracketed text] with your specific details
Paste into ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini
Refine the output with follow-up questions

sections.title: Pro Tip — Getting Better Results
sections.content: The best results come from being specific. Instead of [topic], write the exact topic. Instead of [audience], describe your actual target reader. The more context you give, the better the output.

sections.title: The 10 Prompts
sections.content: 10 hand-picked prompts from the full AI Starter Kit.

items.name: The Daily Prioritizer
items.prompt: Act as my personal productivity coach. I have [X hours] available today. Here are my tasks: [list your tasks]. Prioritize them using the Eisenhower Matrix. Build me a time-blocked schedule with buffer periods.

items.name: The Email Drafter
items.prompt: Write a professional email to [recipient's role] at [company type] requesting [specific outcome]. Tone: direct but warm. Length: under 120 words. End with a single, clear ask. Do not use 'I hope this email finds you well.'

items.name: The Business Idea Validator
items.prompt: I have a business idea: [describe in 2-3 sentences]. Act as a brutally honest VC. Analyze: 5 biggest risks, ideal customer and market size, 3 existing competitors, what needs to be true for success, and a $100 validation test I can run this week.

items.name: The Blog Post Generator
items.prompt: Write a 1,000-word blog post about [topic] for [audience]. Structure: Hook opening, 3-5 subheadings with actionable content, real examples, conclusion with CTA. Tone: [your preference]. Do NOT use 'In today's fast-paced world' or similar cliches.

items.name: The Content Calendar
items.prompt: Create a 30-day content calendar for [business] on [platform]. Include daily topic, content type, caption with hook and CTA, and hashtags. Content pillars: [list 3-4]. Mix educational, entertaining, and promotional at 40/40/20.

items.name: The Research Synthesizer
items.prompt: I need to quickly understand [topic]. Provide: 3-sentence simple summary, 5 most important facts, key players, current trends, common misconceptions, and 3 sources for deeper reading.

items.name: The SWOT Analyzer
items.prompt: Conduct a SWOT analysis for [business/project]. 5+ specific items per quadrant. Then create a 2x2 action matrix showing how to leverage strengths and fix weaknesses.

items.name: The Skill Learning Plan
items.prompt: Create a 30-day plan to go from beginner to competent in [skill]. Daily 30-60 min tasks, free resources, weekly mini-projects, and common mistakes to avoid.

items.name: The Landing Page Copy
items.prompt: Write landing page copy for [product/service]. Hero headline, 3 pain points, solution section, features-to-benefits, social proof, FAQ, and final CTA with urgency.

items.name: The MEGA Prompt Framework
items.prompt: [ROLE]: Act as [expert]. [CONTEXT]: Background info. [TASK]: What to do. [FORMAT]: Output format. [CONSTRAINTS]: Rules. [TONE]: Voice. [EXAMPLE]: Sample output.

sections.title: Upsell / CTA
sections.content: Loved These Prompts? You've only scratched the surface. The full AI Starter Kit has 50+ prompts across 8 categories.
